title: GIAA Board members’ register of declared interests 2024/25
body: "Board members are asked to declare any personal, professional, or related party interests, that may, or may be perceived by a reasonable member of the public to, influence their judgements in performing their obligations to the department.  The purpose of this list is to meet the requirements of section 6.4.3(e) of the Government Financial Reporting Manual and paragraph 4.15 of the Corporate governance in central departments: code of good practice. "
